title: Non-combustible aerosol provision device
abstract: A non-combustible aerosol provision device (100) for generating aerosol from aerosol-generating material during at least one session of use of the non-combustible aerosol provision device is disclosed. The non-combustible aerosol provision device (100) comprises a sensor (110) to detect the presence of residue produced as a consequence of the at least one session of use and remaining in the non-combustible aerosol provision device (100) after the at least one session of use.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A non-combustible aerosol provision device for generating aerosol from aerosol generating material during at least one session of use of the non-combustible aerosol provision device, wherein the non-combustible aerosol provision device comprises: a sensor to detect the presence of residue produced as a consequence of the at least one session of use and remaining in the non-combustible aerosol provision device after the at least one session of use. 2. A non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in claim 1, wherein the sensor is located away from a first end of the non-combustible aerosol provision device from which aerosol generated by the non-combustible aerosol provision device is output in use. 3. A non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in claim 1 or 2, wherein the sensor is configured to detect moisture in the non-combustible aerosol provision device. 4. A non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in any of claims 1, 2 or 3, wherein the non-combustible aerosol provision device comprises an analyser communicatively connected to the sensor, wherein the analyser is configured to analyse an output from the sensor and determine a level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device on the basis of the output. 5. A non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in claim 4, wherein the non combustible aerosol provision device is configured to perform in a cleaning mode an attempt to remove the residue from the non-combustible aerosol provision device, and wherein performance of the non-combustible aerosol provision device in the cleaning mode is dependent on the level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device as determined by the analyser. 6. A non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in claim 4, wherein the non combustible aerosol provision device is configured to perform in a cleaning mode an attempt to remove the residue from the non-combustible aerosol provision device, and wherein the cleaning mode is selected from a plurality of cleaning modes based on the level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device as determined by the analyser. 7. A non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in any preceding claim, comprising an indicator communicatively connected to the sensor, wherein the indicator is configured to provide, to a user of the non-combustible aerosol provision device, an indication relating to the presence of the residue, on the basis of an output from the sensor. 8. A non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in any preceding claim, comprising a transmitter communicatively connected to the sensor, wherein the transmitter is configured to transmit data to a remote unit on the basis of an output from the sensor. 9. A non-combustible aerosol provision system comprising: a consumable comprising aerosol-generating material; and a non-combustible aerosol provision device as claimed in any preceding claim. 10. A method of operating a non-combustible aerosol provision device, wherein the method comprises: detecting, by a sensor of the non-combustible aerosol provision device, residue produced as a consequence of at least one session of use of the non-combustible aerosol provision device to generate aerosol and remaining in the non-combustible aerosol provision device after the at least one session of use. 11. A method as claimed in claim 10, comprising: transmitting, by a transmitter of the non-combustible aerosol provision device, data to a remote unit on the basis of an output from the sensor. 12. A method as claimed in claim 10 or 11 comprising: analysing, by an analyser, an output from the sensor to determine a level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device on the basis of the output. 13. A method as claimed in claims 11 and 12, wherein the analysing comprises analysing by an analyser of the remote unit. 14. A method as claimed in claim 12 or 13, comprising: causing the non-combustible aerosol provision device to perform in a cleaning mode an attempt to remove the residue from the non-combustible aerosol provision device, wherein performance of the non-combustible aerosol provision device in the cleaning mode 

is dependent on the level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device as determined by the analyser. 15. A method as claimed in claim 12 or 13, comprising: causing the non-combustible aerosol provision device to perform in a cleaning mode an attempt to remove the residue from the non-combustible aerosol provision device, wherein the cleaning mode is selected from a plurality of cleaning modes based on the level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device as determined by the analyser. 16. A method as claimed in any of claims 10-15, comprising: providing, using an indicator, to a user of the non-combustible aerosol provision device an indication relating to the presence of the residue, on the basis of an output from the sensor. 17. An alert system comprising: a non-combustible aerosol provision device for generating aerosol from aerosol generating material during at least one session of use of the non-combustible aerosol provision device; and a remote unit communicable with the non-combustible aerosol provision device; wherein the alert system comprises an indicator to indicate that the non-combustible aerosol provision device requires cleaning on the basis of data communicated between the non-combustible aerosol provision device and the remote unit. 18. An alert system as claimed in claim 17, wherein: the non-combustible aerosol provision device comprises: a transmitter configured to transmit the data from the non-combustible aerosol provision device; and the remote unit comprises: a receiver configured to receive the data transmitted by the non-combustible aerosol provision device; wherein the indicator is configured to indicate that the non-combustible aerosol provision device requires cleaning on the basis of the data transmitted by the non combustible aerosol provision device. 19. An alert system as claimed in claim 17, wherein: the non-combustible aerosol provision device comprises: a storage to store the data; and the remote unit comprises: a detector configured to obtain the data stored by the non-combustible aerosol provision device in the storage; wherein indicator is configured to indicate that the non-combustible aerosol provision device requires cleaning on the basis of the data obtained by the detector of the remote unit. 20. An alert system as claimed in any of claims 17, 18 or 19, wherein the remote unit comprises the indicator. 21. An alert system as claimed in any of claims 17, 18 or 19, wherein the non combustible aerosol provision device comprises the indicator. 22. An alert system as claimed in any of claims 17-21, wherein the non-combustible aerosol provision device comprises: a sensor to detect residue produced as a consequence of the at least one session of use and remaining in the non-combustible aerosol provision device after the at least one session of use; wherein the data comprises information related to an output from the sensor. 23. An alert system as claimed in any of claims 18-22, wherein: the transmitter is configured to transmit the data from the non-combustible aerosol provision device on the basis of the output from the sensor; and the indicator is configured to indicate the presence of the residue on the basis of the data transmitted by the non-combustible aerosol provision device. 24. An alert system as claimed in claim 22, or claim 23 when dependent on claim 22, wherein the non-combustible aerosol provision device comprises: an analyser communicatively connected to the sensor, wherein the analyser is configured to analyse the output from the sensor and determine information about a level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device on the basis of the output from the sensor. 25. An alert system as claimed in any of claims 17-23, wherein the remote unit comprises: an analyser to analyse the data and determine information about a level of cleanliness of the non-combustible aerosol provision device on the basis of the data. 26. An alert system as claimed in any of claims 17-25, wherein the indictor is configured to indicate a mode of cleaning required on the basis of the data communicated. 27. An alert system as claimed in claim 26, wherein the mode of cleaning required is selected from a plurality of cleaning modes. 28. An alert system as claimed in claim 26 or 27, wherein the mode of cleaning required comprises: intensive cleaning; moderate cleaning; or that the cleaning may be postponed. 29. A method of indicating a need to clean a non-combustible aerosol provision device, wherein the method comprises: communicating data between the non-combustible aerosol provision device and a remote unit; and indicating, by an indicator, that the non-combustible aerosol provision device requires cleaning on the basis of the data communicated between the non-combustible aerosol provision device and the remote unit. 30. A method as claimed in claim 29, wherein the communicating comprises: transmitting, by a transmitter of the non-combustible aerosol provision device, the data from the non-combustible aerosol provision device; and receiving, by a receiver of the remote unit, the data transmitted by the non combustible aerosol provision device; wherein the indicating is on the basis of the data transmitted by the non-combustible aerosol provision device. 31. A method as claimed in claim 29, wherein the communicating comprises: storing, in a storage of the non-combustible aerosol provision device, the data; and 

 obtaining, by a detector of the remote unit, the data stored in the storage; wherein the indicating is on the basis of the data obtained by the detector of the remote unit. 32. A method as claimed in claim 29, 30 or 31 , wherein the indicating comprises indicating a mode of cleaning required on the basis of the data communicated. 33. A method as claimed in claim 32, wherein the mode of cleaning required is selected from a plurality of cleaning modes. 34. A method as claimed in claim 32 or 33, wherein indicating the mode of cleaning required comprises: indicating that the device requires intensive cleaning; indicating that the device requires moderate cleaning; or indicating that the cleaning may be postponed.
